channel.title: github_trending

item.title: YishenTu /claudian | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: An Obsidian plugin that embeds Claude Code as an AI collaborator in your vault

item.description: The first open-source harness builder for AI coding. Make AI coding deterministic and repeatable.

item.title: TheCraigHewitt /seomachine | Python | N/A
item.description: A specialized Claude Code workspace for creating long-form, SEO-optimized blog content for any business. This system helps you research, write, analyze, and optimize content that ranks well and serves your target audience.

item.title: obra /superpowers | Shell | N/A
item.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

item.description: PDF Parser for AI-ready data. Automate PDF accessibility. Open-source.

item.description: VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning

item.title: forrestchang /andrej-karpathy-skills | N/A | N/A
item.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

item.title: NousResearch /hermes-agent | Python | N/A
item.description: The agent that grows with you
